mongolia has several famous tourist attractions, including the gobi desert, the khustain national park, and the terelj national park. *highlighted section* the gobi desert is one of the most popular destinations for adventure and wildlife enthusiasts. the khustain national park is known for its wild horses, while the terelj national park offers beautiful landscapes and is close to ulan bator. the gobi desert is also home to ancient dinosaur fossils and unique rock formations.
